part.partDescription: Racetrap Sunglasses - Matte Metallic Viperidae - Bronze Multilayer Mirror Lens
part.bullet1: Designed in California, made in Europe
part.bullet2: Ultra HD lenses manufactured in France from shatterproof and impact-resistant polycarbonate
part.bullet3: Optically correct decentered 6 base spherical shield
part.bullet4: Interchangeable lenses
part.bullet5: 100% UV protection (UV400)
part.bullet6: Durable, flexible and lightweight TR90 frame
part.bullet7: Scratch-resistant lens coating of the highest quality
part.bullet8: Hydrophobic and Oleophobic lens treatment repels water, dirt and oil
part.bullet9: Ultra-grip rubber nose and temple tips provide a secure fit
part.bullet10: Comes with a hard case, microfiber cleaning bag, clear replacement lens, and extra alternative fit nose pad

part.bullet4: 100% UV protection (UV400)
part.bullet5: Scratch-resistant lens coating of the highest quality
part.bullet6: Hydrophobic and Oleophobic lens treatment repels water, dirt and oil
part.bullet7: Durable, flexible and lightweight TR90 frame
part.bullet8: Ultra-grip rubber nose and temple tips provide a secure fit

part.partDescription: Speedcraft Sunglasses - Soft Tact Black - HiPER Red Multilayer Mirror Lens
part.bullet1: High-impact resistant and lightweight polycarbonate lenses
part.bullet2: 5-base cylindrical shield lens for increased peripheral view and protection
part.bullet3: 360 degree visibility for unobstructed views and optimal field of vision
part.bullet4: Interchangeable scratch-resistant lenses provide 100% UV protection
part.bullet5: Lower air scoops to increase ventilation while reducing moisture on the lens
part.bullet6: HYDROILO lens treatment repels water, dirt and oil
part.bullet7: Temple arm scoops to manage moisture
part.bullet8: Shatterproof and lightweight Grilamid TR90 frame
part.bullet9: Ultra-grip rubber nose pads and tips for a secure fit no matter how much you sweat

part.bullet6: Waterproof pocket zippers for added security of essentials
part.bullet7: Waterproof hem zippers to aid in dressing and removal with ease
part.bullet8: Stabilization pocket to store device or tool
part.bullet9: Silicone print on inner waistband to minimize slippage
part.bullet10: Aerodynamic fit for best riding performance

part.partDescription: Accuri 2 Goggle - Neon Yellow - Silver Mirror Lens
part.bullet1: Improved fitment and seal with increased field of view
part.bullet2: Supports triple post tear-offs for secure fitment
part.bullet3: Ultra-thick triple layer face foam soaks up sweat
part.bullet4: 45 mm wide silicone coated strap for maximum grip
part.bullet5: 9-point lens retention system secures lens in frame
part.bullet6: Slash logo embellishment detail
part.bullet7: Anti-fog coated polycarbonate lens for clear vision

part.partDescription: Strata 2 Goggle - Neon Orange - True Gold Mirror Lens
part.bullet1: Improved fitment and seal with increased field of view
part.bullet2: Supports triple post tear-offs for secure fitment

part.partDescription: Armega Snow Goggle - Complex - Blue Mirror Lens
part.bullet1: Injection-molded, high impact resistant, Ultra HD optically correct lens with integrated 6-point licking tabs for maximum retention
part.bullet2: Full contour lens gasket for a maximum seal against moisture and debris
part.bullet3: Dual push to lock and lift to release security latches for maximum lens security
part.bullet4: Cutting edge fully bonded dual injection frame for maximum strength and durability
part.bullet5: Ultra-wide 48 mm strap with thick silicone beads for maximum helmet grip
part.bullet6: Enlarged face foam with molded characteristics for superior ergonomics and sealing
part.bullet7: Next generation sweat collection management and drainage system
part.bullet8: Plush triple-layer face foam for maximum comfort
part.bullet9: Hi-flow air intake ports with distribution up and around face foam that aids in superior humidity evacuation
part.bullet10: Optional nose guard for extra protection against snow and debris

part.bullet6: Silicone printed palm and fingers improve grip and lever traction
part.bullet7: Integrated tech-thread keeps you connected with your phone
